coverage.note: Manual analysis. All changed methods have test coverage. Goal.RunAsync save/restore covered by simulation test (not integration).

resolved_from_v1.how: Cast<T> helper with is/Convert.ChangeType/fallback. 3 tests added.
Simulation test proves concept. Integration test deferred (tracked in todos.md).
3-level scope chain test with null gap.
Scope.Set now removes key on null. Set_NullValue_RemovesKey test.
Requires builder + OpenAI key. Todo exists.

findings.issue: Cast<T> bare catch swallows all exceptions including OverflowException. Silent fallback to default with no diagnostic path.
findings.impact: Hard to debug 'why is my setting not taking effect?' when the value is the right type but wrong range.
findings.suggestion: Acceptable for now. Consider adding a debug log when fallback is used.

findings.issue: GoalRunAsync_ScopesSettingsPerGoal is a simulation test, not an integration test. Doesn't exercise actual RunAsync code path.
findings.impact: Low — simulation proves the mechanism. Integration test needs Goal construction infrastructure.
findings.suggestion: Tracked in todos.md. Build test when Goal construction helpers exist.

summary: 1262 C# tests pass. All critical and major findings from v1 are resolved. Cast<T> helper handles numeric widening, enum conversion, and type mismatches gracefully. Scope chain gaps, overwrite, null removal, and clone preservation all tested. Two minor deferred items remain (simulation vs integration test, PLang tests). Verdict: approved — pass to auditor.
